core_principles: Gamification First: Every interaction provides feedback (haptic, visual, auditory).
Crypto Native, Human Friendly: Use crypto aesthetics (glass, neon) but hide complexity.
Depth over Flatness: Use layers, z-index, and backdrop-blur to create a tactile 3D space.
Mobile Obsession: Thumb-zone navigation is law. No essential buttons in the top corners.

mood_board.visual_style: Dark Glassmorphism, Cyberpunk Accents, Liquid Gradients

accent.description: Used for success states and XP gains

container.description: Constrain the app to a mobile-width on desktop to maintain the app-feel.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 rounded-2xl font-bold shadow-lg shadow-primary/25 hover:shadow-primary/40 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary border border-secondary/20 h-12 rounded-2xl font-semibold hover:bg-secondary/20 transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground hover:text-white rounded-xl h-10 px-4
buttons.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 h-12 rounded-2xl shadow-sm

cards.base: bg-[#0F0720]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-3xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden relative

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#030014]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 h-20 pb-4 pt-2 z-50 flex justify-around items-center

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use heavily. Create depth by layering glass panels with different opacities.
visual_enhancers.neon_glows: Use colored shadows to simulate neon lights behind cards.
visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Add a subtle SVG noise overlay to the background to reduce banding and add texture.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Theme: Implement the dark mode colors as the DEFAULT. Add a class 'dark' to the HTML tag if needed, but the design should primarily look dark.
3. Navigation: Build the bottom tab bar FIRST. It is the anchor of the mobile app.
4. Home Page: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout. Hero section = XP Balance + Level. Small blocks = Streak, Daily Bonus.
5. Rewards: Use a masonry or grid layout for rewards. Cards must have a glass effect.
6. Wheel: Create a dedicated page or modal for the spin wheel. Make it feel physics-based.
7. Streak: Use a horizontal scrollable calendar or a vertical timeline. Mark active days with a 'fire' icon or glowing dot.
8. Mock Data: Create a robust 'mock_data.js' file with users, missions, and rewards. Do not hardcode data in components.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
